name: I quit my noisy job 2 years ago and just noticed hearing problems, can I still claim?
description: Yes, within 1 year of last exposure in Utah; prove with tests.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: I quit my noisy job 2 years ago and just noticed hearing problems, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, within 1 year of last exposure in Utah; prove with tests.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if you file within the time limit from last exposure; Utah's 1-year SOL starts from final injurious noise.[1][3] Context: Former employees qualify for occupational disease claims with proof of work causation.[1] Key factors: Audiogram confirming NIHL, old exposure records, no recent non-work causes.[1][4] Practical guidance: Act fast—get tested, collect safety logs or witness statements, submit to state commission; attorney handles proof gaps.[3][7] Delays risk denial but appeals work.
